title: hieracium umbrosum subsp. crepidopsis
intro: Hieracium umbrosum subsp. crepidopsis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium umbrosum subsp. crepidopsis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried herb or tincture, and can also be made into a salve or infusion for topical application.
